author: gb9t
content: Resuming long-tail driver enumeration as a slow background task per /goal: one vendor-specific driver Tier-3 doc per turn. Each doc: full Tier-3 template (Summary, Upstream refs, REQ-1..N, AC-*, Architecture, Hardening, Grsec/PaX section, Open Questions, Verification), aware of upstream Linux source paths, explicit about Rust translation target. Starting with drivers/net/ethernet/mellanox/mlx5/core/ (mlx5-core.md) — every Mellanox ConnectX NIC depends on it. Will commit after each doc, one per iteration.
